zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Bowyer II於大約1552年出生在英國維爾爾布拉頓時，他的父親Francis Bowyer I28歲，母親Elizabeth Tyllesworth26歲。他於1578年與Ann Hurlbut在英國維爾爾布拉頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1581年在英國賀特福爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Bowyer II于大约1552年出生在英国維爾爾布拉頓时，他的父亲Francis Bowyer I28岁，母亲Elizabeth Tyllesworth26岁。他于1578年与Ann Hurlbut在英国維爾爾布拉頓结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1581年在英国賀特福爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bowyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

variants.name: Bowman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for an archer, hunter or soldier armed with a bow, from Middle English bow(e)man, bouman (from Old English boga ‘bow’ + mann ‘man’). This word was distinguished from Bowyer , which denoted a maker or seller of bows.
Americanized form of German   Baumann   or the Dutch cognate   Bouwman  .

variants.name: Bouyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Frederique, Monique, Napoleon.
French (southern): regional variant of   Bouvier  . Compare   Beyea  .

variants.name: Boyers
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Bowyer II was born about 1552, in Bratton, Wiltshire, England, his father, Francis Bowyer I, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, was 26. He married Ann Hurlbut in 1578, in Bratton, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died about 1581, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francis Bowyer II est né environ 1552, à Bratton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Francis Bowyer I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ann Hurlbut en 1578, à Bratton, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1581, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francis Bowyer II um 1552 in Bratton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Francis Bowyer I 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tyllesworth 26. Er hat 1578 in Bratton, Wiltshire, England Ann Hurlbut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1581 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bowyer II è nato il circa 1552 nel Bratton, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Francis Bowyer I, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ann Hurlbut nel 1578, nel Bratton, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1581, nel Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Bowyer IIが約1552年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラットオンで生まれた時，父Francis Bowyer Iは28歳，母Elizabeth Tyllesworthは26歳であった。1578年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラットオンでAnn Hurlbutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1581年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Bowyer II(이)가 대략 1552년 영국 윌츠히르 브래턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Bowyer I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tyllesworth(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1578년 영국 윌츠히르 브래턴에서 Ann Hurlbut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1581년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1552–about 1581: tany ho any amin'ny 1552–tany ho any amin'ny 1581

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francis Bowyer II nasceu aproximadamente 1552, em Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Francis Bowyer I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Hurlbut em 1578, em Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1581, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Bowyer II родился около 1552 г. в местности браттон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Francis Bowyer I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tyllesworth, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Hurlbut в 1578 г. в местности браттон, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер около 1581 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год.

sm.about 1552–about 1581: e tusa o le 1552–e tusa o le 1581

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francis Bowyer II nació aproximadamente 1552, en Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Francis Bowyer I, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tyllesworth, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ann Hurlbut en 1578, en Bratton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1581, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años.
